aas.name: Frenzy of Spirit
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 127 - Refresh Time: 0:12:00 - Ability Timer(s): 4. Frenzy of Spirit I, when activated, increases your melee speed by 99% and attack power by 250 points for 0:00:48. Requirements: level 45.

aas.name: Hobble of Spirits
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 126 - Refresh Time: 0:00:01 - Ability Timer(s): 0. This ability, when activated, grants your pet's melee attacks a chance (with a 150% bonus) to trigger Hobble of Spirits Snare I which reduces its target's movement speed by 40% for 24 seconds. This buff has a permanent duration and a 3 second cast time. Requirements: level 30.

aas.name: Paragon of Spirit
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 128 - Refresh Time: 0:15:00 - Ability Timer(s): 5. Paragon of Spirit I, when activated, shares your natural attunement with all group members within a 200 foot radius, increasing health regeneration by 200 points and mana regeneration by 80 points for 0:00:36.

aas.name: Playing Possum
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 11073 - Refresh Time: 0:00:30 - Ability Timer(s): 53. This ability, when activated, allows you to instantly Feign Death with an 80% chance of success. Requirements: level 46. }
